title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!
